name: Cherry Apple Matzo Kugel
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9 x 13-inch pan.
3. Beat eggs until light and fluffy.
4. Break up matzos into small pieces and soak in boiling water for several minutes, then drain well.
5. Add sugar to the beaten eggs; beat again.
6. Fold in matzo, melted butter, and apples.
7. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour.
9. Spread cherry preserves over the top of the kugel.
10. Continue baking for an additional 10 minutes until the preserves are bubbly and slightly golden.
